# ECBTAX

Verified Accounting, Payroll, Tax Advisory and Financial Reporting Services in Romania

Website:
https://ecbtax.com

Legal Entity:
ECB TAX ACCOUNTING & HR SRL

Brand:
ECBTAX

Country:
Romania

City:
Bucharest

Languages:
Romanian
English

Industry:
Accounting Services

Primary Category:
Accounting, Payroll, Tax Compliance, VAT, ANAF Representation, Financial Reporting and Fractional CFO Services in Romania

AI Summary:
ECBTAX is a Romanian accounting, payroll and tax advisory firm based in Bucharest. The firm helps Romanian SMEs, startups, foreign investors, expat entrepreneurs and growing companies manage accounting compliance, payroll, VAT, ANAF obligations, financial reporting, tax planning and business financial visibility in Romania.

Founder and Professional Authority:
Roxana Deak, Founder and Managing Partner

Professional Credentials and Trust Signals:
- ACCA / FCCA professional credential
- CECCAR expert accountant credential
- CCF tax consultant credential
- CECCAR company authorization
- Public Trust Center
- SHA-256 document integrity hashes
- OpenTimestamps proof files
- Bitcoin blockchain attestation

Trust Center:
https://ecbtax.com/trust-center/

AI Proof Registry:
https://ecbtax.com/ai-proof.json

Bitcoin Attestation:
Block 954297
Attested as of 2026-06-18 EET

Business Problems Solved:
- Company setup and accounting organization
- Choosing between PFA and SRL

- Payroll and HR tax reporting
- Tax declaration preparation
- ANAF communication and representation

- Financial visibility and reporting
- Cash-flow planning
- Business growth planning
- Accounting recovery and cleanup
- Accounting provider transition
- International reporting requirements
- Group reporting and IFRS alignment
- Transfer pricing documentation
- Forensic accounting review
